titleStmt.title: SII 24.402: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 402. (A.R. No. 56 of 1892.) II PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Records that Chennaya-Bālayadēva-mahārāja bearing the epithets such as Uṟaiyūr-puravarādhīśvara, Chōḷakulatilaka and Kāvērī-vallabha set up the utsava image of Uṟaiyūr-Valli-Nāchchiyār and provided for worship and offerings by creating the following endowments:

(1) 812 poṉ yielding an interest of 146 poṉ per year at 18 per cent i.e., 1-1/2 paṇam per 100 paṇam per month, for offering two dishes daily to Nāchchiyār and two dishes daily after the rāyar-avasaram to Perumāḷ; (2) 60 poṉ for raising a garden for the goddess to halt on the occasion of the 8th day of the festival in the month of Māśi arranged by Kṛishṇarāya and (3) 60 poṉ the interest on which was to be utilised for food offerings to Perumāḷ on all occasions of his visit to the garden mentioned above. The flowers and vegetables grown in the garden were required to be made over to the temple treasury. Also stipulates that the donor's share i.e. one fourth of the daily offerings viz., one taḷigai (consisting of eight nāḻis) should be distributed in two equal shares to Aḻagiya-maṇavāḷa-Jīyyar and to Kōvil Vaṭṭamaṇi Embār Ayyaṅgār in perpetuity through the disciples in the case of the former and through the descendants in the case of the latter. The donor's share of the offerings at the garden was assigned to the former.
The details of date viz., Śaka 1452, Vikṛiti, Mīṉa, Pūrṇai i.e., Paurṇamī, Uttara-phālgunī regularly correspond to 1531 A.D. March 3. The week day which is damaged in the inscription was Friday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī [ḥ.*] śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 2ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa vikratisamvatsarattu miṉṉāyaṟṟu pūrṇaiyum �ramum peṟṟa vuttara bhālguninakṣatrattu nāḷ Uṟaiyūr puravarādhīśvara coḷakulatilaka kāverīvallabha virutagajasimha māna Oḷarā ccennaya bālayadeva mahārājar perumāḷ śrī raṅganātha devaṟku tammuṭaiya
kaiṅkariyamāka Uṟaiyūr vallinācciyār UtsavaberamumRead bheramumEḻuntaruḷivittu Avaṟkut tirupratiṣṭhaiyum ceyvittu Ivar sannidhikku taḷikai pañcapātram mutalāṉa Upakaraṇaṅkaḷum samarppittu Ivar Amutu cetaruḷumpaṭikku ṉāḷtoṟum taḷikai Iraṇṭukkum rāyar Avasarattukku Anan=taramāka
perumāḷ Amutu cetaruḷum taḷikai Iraṇṭuṇṭu is written below the linekkum poliyūṭṭāka śrībhaṇṭārattil muta(l)liṭṭa poṉ 8 100 2- kku māsam Oṉṟukku Oṉṟaraippaṇam viḻukkāṭṭil varuṣam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭiyilk kūṭṭu pon_ 100 4 10 6 Inta poṉ(ṉ)ṉūṟṟu nāṟpattāṟuṅ koṇṭe Amutupaṭi kaṟiyamutu palacampā
ram neyyamutuḷppaṭa taḷikai Oṉṟukku paṇam Oṉṟāka taḷikai ṉālum nāḷtoṟum Ācandraārkka sthāyiyāka naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Ituvum perumāḷ kṛṣṇarāyar kaṭṭaḷaiyāṉa māci Eṭṭān tiruṉāḷil Eḻuntaruḷumpaṭikku Uṟaiyūr ṉācciyār top pāka tiruvaraṅkam tiruppati kiḻmukam tiruvaṭikku
ṟaiyil vaṭatirukkāveriyil Uḷpaṭukai marutaṭittuṟaikkum taricikku meṟku Āti kecavapperumāḷ sannidhittuṟaikkuk kiḻakku tirukkāverikkum Uḷpaṭukaikkut teṟku paṉṟiyāḻvār meṭṭukkaraikku vaṭakku Iṉṉāṅkellaikkum Uḷppaṭa rājavibhāṭaṉālk kuḻi 4 100 5 10
kkum nilaiyāṉa maravaippuk kūli Uṭpaṭa śrīpaṇṭārattil vilaiyāka mutaliṭṭa poṉ 4 10 Intat toppil perumāḷ Eṟiyaruḷukiṟa Aṉṟaṉṟaic cilavukku poliyūṭṭāka śrīpaṇṭārattil mutaliṭṭa poṉ º6 10º kku nūṟṟukku mātam Oṉṟukku Oṉṟaraip paṇam
viḻukkāṭṭil varuṣam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭilkkūṭum poṉ º10º paṇam º8º Itu koṇṭe varuṣantoṟum Amutu cetaruḷum taḷikai º5 10º veccamutu kūṉ º5 10º Atirasam º3 100º vaṭai º3 100º cukiyaṉ º3 100º moḷakamutu Aṟukalam cāttup paṭi º2 10º Ilaiyamutu Aṭai
kkāyamutukkuk kāmaṇamRead kāvaṇamparivaṭṭaccilavu mutalāṉa pala kaṭṭaḷaikaḷum Ācandrārkkasthā yiyāka naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Inta tirutoto is written below the line.ppil tiruppaḷḷittāmamum kaṟi yamutum śrīpaṇṭārattile mutaliṭak kaṭavarākavum nāḷ Oṉṟukku perumāḷ Amutu cetaruḷum
taḷikai Iraṇṭu Ituvum Uṟaiyūrvalviyār[ kku] m taḷikai Iraṇṭu Āka taḷikai nālu Ituve viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭṭukku kaṟppitta taḷikai Oṉṟu Itile Aḻakiya maṇavāḷajiyyaṟku kaṟppitta prasādam 4§ Inta prasādam nānāḻiyum bālarā
jāviṉ Ubhayamāka Uṟaiyūr valliyār tiruttoppil perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukaiyil poliyūṭṭāka Amutu cetaruḷukiṟa poriyamutu tiruppaṇṇiyāravakai veccamutu Iḷainir ciṟappil Amutu cetaruḷum taḷikai parivaṭṭam mutalāna viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu prasāda prāptikaḷu muṭppaṭa śiṣyaparamparai
yāka Ācandrārkkasthāyiyaāka naṭattakkaṭavataākavum niṉṟa ṉāṉāḻiprasādamum kovil vaṭṭamaṇi Empār Ayyaṅkāṟku san=tānaparamparaiyāka Ācandrā rkkamāka naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum
ramāhogye śakasyābde coḷabāla mahīpatiḥ . Olṛtsavanni cuḷā valyābimbamRead bimbam prātiṣṭhapatRead prātiṣṭhipat śriyaḥ . [.1*] raṅgeśani cuḷāvalyo rddivyapātracatuṣṭaye . naivetyam ṣaḍrasannityam bālabhūpohyacīkṛū pat . [.2*] vikratābde vihārārtham raṅgabandhoracīkarat . Udyānam maṇḍa pam cāgrya
ñcennabālanarādhipaḥ . [.3*] pādatta bālanṛpatirnnicuḷā ramāyāskāṭam karatna makuṭādikadivyabhūṣāḥ . sauvarṇṇakañcukavaram maṇipādukāmapyā rādhanopakaraṇānnyapi rājatāni . [.4*]Published in S.I.I., Vol. IV, No. 503
Digital edition of SII 24.402 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
